memory.scopeHint: This is scope-level config for chat. Existing agents still move to Standard memory only when you explicitly trigger upgrade in chat.
memory.notConfiguredHint: Choose a cloud connector or an active local embedding model. Chat memory upgrades will use this source.
memory.cloudReadyHint: Cloud memory embedding is configured and the selected connector advertises text.embed support.
memory.cloudUnavailableHint: The saved cloud connector or model is no longer healthy, or it no longer exposes text.embed.
memory.localReadyHint: A local embedding model is active and ready for future chat memory upgrades.
memory.localUnavailableHint: The saved local embedding target is no longer active. Start or install an embedding model first.

overview.systemResourcesStaleDescription: A refresh failed, so these values may be outdated.
overview.systemResourcesUnavailableDescription: The desktop runtime could not provide a live system snapshot.
overview.mockDataSysinfo: Mock data — will connect to Tauri sysinfo
overview.noUsageRecords: No usage records in current window.
overview.mockDataUsage: Mock data — will derive from usage stats
overview.capabilityCoverageDesc: AI capabilities available via local runtime or cloud API fallback
overview.runtimeDaemonDesc: Monitor and manage local AI model inference process health.
overview.costDisclaimer: Estimates based on catalog pricing; actual costs may vary.

local.retryingInstall: Retrying install: {{modelId}}. Download progress will appear below.
local.dependenciesAppliedSyncFailed: Dependencies applied, but Go runtime sync failed: {{message}}
local.profileAppliedSyncFailed: Profile installed, but Go runtime sync failed: {{message}}

local.fileImportStarted: File import started: {{modelId}}. Progress will appear below.
local.modelStartedSyncFailed: Model started locally, but Go runtime sync failed: {{message}}
local.modelStoppedSyncFailed: Model stopped locally, but Go runtime sync failed: {{message}}

local.modelRemovedSyncFailed: Model removed locally, but Go runtime sync failed: {{message}}
local.runtimeUnavailableWriteReadOnly: Runtime unavailable. Local model writes are disabled in read-only mode.
local.recommendationSummaryRecommended: Good fit for {{workload}} on this machine.
local.recommendationSummaryRunnable: Should run for {{workload}}, but with less headroom.
local.recommendationSummaryTight: Likely to run {{workload}}, but memory will be tight.
local.recommendationSummaryNotRecommended: Not a good fit for {{workload}} on this machine.
local.recommendationSummaryAttached: Requires an attached endpoint for this engine.
local.recommendationSummaryUnsupported: Managed host support is unavailable on this machine.
local.recommendationReasonBaselineImageDefault: Scored against the default image workload baseline.
local.recommendationReasonBaselineVideoDefault: Scored against the default video workload baseline.
local.recommendationReasonEngineOverheadApplie: Engine runtime overhead was included in the estimate.
local.recommendationReasonHardPrerequisiteOver: Required supporting model overhead was included in the estimate.
local.recommendationReasonGpuMemoryUnknown: GPU memory could not be measured directly.
local.recommendationReasonHostAttachedOnly: This engine is only supported through an attached endpoint here.
local.recommendationReasonHostUnsupported: This engine is not supported on the current host.
local.recommendationReasonMainSizeUnknown: The runnable asset size was unavailable, so the estimate is conservative.
local.recommendationReasonMetadataIncomplete: Catalog metadata was incomplete, so confidence was reduced.
local.recommendationReasonMemoryBudgetExceeded: The estimated workload exceeds available memory budget.
local.recommendationReasonMemoryHeadroomRunnab: Available memory is enough, but with limited headroom.
local.recommendationReasonMemoryHeadroomTight: The model may fit, but memory headroom is tight.
local.recommendationReasonSafetensorsRepoLevel: SafeTensors scoring used a repo-level estimate.
local.recommendationReasonUnifiedMemoryEstimat: The estimate used unified memory instead of discrete VRAM.
local.recommendationReasonVariantQuantParsed: Quantization details were inferred from the variant filename.
local.recommendationReasonLlmfitCpuOnly: This model is expected to run on CPU only.
local.recommendationReasonLlmfitCpuOffload: This model is expected to rely on CPU offload.
local.recommendationReasonLlmfitGpuPath: This model is expected to use the GPU path.
local.recommendationReasonLlmfitMarginal: LLM fit is marginal on this machine.
local.recommendationReasonLlmfitMoeOffload: This model is expected to use MoE offload.
local.recommendationReasonLlmfitParamsFromFile: Model parameter size was inferred from the filename.
Model parameter size was estimated from the file size.
local.recommendationReasonLlmfitQuantFromFilen: Quantization was inferred from the filename.
local.recommendationReasonLlmfitRecommended: LLM fit indicates strong runtime headroom.
local.recommendationReasonLlmfitRunnable: LLM fit indicates the model should run with reduced headroom.
local.recommendationReasonLlmfitTight: LLM fit indicates a tight runtime budget.
local.recommendationReasonLlmfitContextDefault: Context size was estimated from the default baseline.
local.recommendationReasonLlmfitVisionModel: The model was treated as a vision-capable chat model.

cloud.connectorsDesc: Configure API keys for cloud-based AI providers. Used as fallback when local runtime is unavailable.
cloud.liveInventoryHint: This provider loads models from the connector endpoint at runtime. Configure an explicit default model or choose a live model in route/chat settings.
cloud.noConnectorsHint: Click "Add" to create your first connector
cloud.credentialTypeFixedForProvider: This provider only supports one credential type
cloud.credentialTypeImmutableAfterCreate: Credential type is fixed after creation
cloud.managedMachineGlobal: Shared across accounts on this machine
cloud.notConfigured: Not configured — set the environment variable in config.json
cloud.oauthRequiresAuth: Managed OAuth connectors require an authenticated desktop session
cloud.codexOauthPendingBody: The browser was opened for Codex sign-in. Enter the code below if prompted, then return here.
cloud.noConnectorSelectedHint: Select a connector above or create a new one

runtime.noNodeAvailabilityData: No node availability data. Run Refresh to probe the local runtime.
runtime.npuHostProbeNotReady: NPU intermediate state: host probe not ready.
runtime.noAuditEvents: No audit events matching current filters.
runtime.noLocalAuditEvents: No local audit events matching current filters.
runtime.name: Name
runtime.managedEngineUnavailable: Managed local engine is unavailable on this host. Configure an attached endpoint to use this provider.
runtime.noAuditEventsHint: Events appear here as mods and apps make authorized runtime calls.
runtime.noUsageHint: Data appears once mods or connected apps start making runtime calls.
runtime.runtimeBinaryMissingMessage: Desktop could not stage the bundled `nimi` runtime. Restart the app or reinstall this desktop release.

mods.noAiModsDesc: No installed mods have declared AI profiles. Install a mod that uses AI capabilities to see its recommended local stacks here.
mods.modsWithAiProfilesDesc: Select a mod to configure its AI profiles.
mods.selectedModDescription: Configure the selected mod's recommended local AI profiles.
mods.selectModPrompt: Select a mod to configure its AI profiles.
mods.setupRequiredDesc: Some capabilities are not available locally. Install a local model or configure a cloud API connector.

profiles.capabilitiesHint: Configure the specific models this profile will use for different tasks.
profiles.clearBindingConfirm: Clear this model binding and reset all related parameters?
profiles.dangerZoneHint: Remove model binding. This will reset all parameters for this capability.
profiles.description: Browse, create, and manage AI capability profiles. Apply a profile to configure all capabilities at once.
profiles.noCustom: No custom profiles yet. Create one or import from a file.
profiles.profileIdentityHint: Set the basic information and persona for this AI profile.
profiles.subtitle: Apply a profile to configure all capabilities at once.

catalog.providerCatalogDesc: Runtime effective catalog = built-in default + custom provider yaml. Save writes custom yaml into runtime custom dir.
catalog.noCatalogMatch: No catalog model matched your query.
catalog.installPlanUnavailable: Install plan unavailable. Try another model or use Advanced install.
catalog.noVerifiedMatch: No verified model matched your query.

eaa.ttlPositiveInteger: TTL must be a positive integer.
eaa.issuedTokensDesc: Tokens issued to external principals. Revoke any token to immediately invalidate it.
eaa.gatewayAcceptingSubline: External agents can request tokens at the bind address below.
eaa.gatewayOfflineSubline: Start the runtime daemon to accept external agent connections.
eaa.gatewayErrorSubline: Unable to reach the local runtime gateway.
eaa.issuedTokensEmptySubtitle: Tokens issued to external principals will appear here.
eaa.noTokensIssuedHint: Issue a token to let an external agent call the runtime.

knowledge.contextDescription: Wave 1 runtime-local knowledge is scoped by request context plus app-private or workspace-private bank ownership.
knowledge.contextHint: Desktop runtime client defaults to app_id=nimi.desktop unless you override it here.
knowledge.workspaceRequired: Workspace-private listing requires a workspace ID.
knowledge.readOnlyMode: Runtime writes are disabled in the current offline tier.
knowledge.bankDescription: Create, select, and delete Wave 1 knowledge banks for the current scope.
knowledge.noBanks: No knowledge banks exist for the current scope yet.
knowledge.pageDescription: List and edit pages in the selected bank. ListPages is paginated and sorted by most recently updated pages first.
knowledge.noPages: No pages found for this bank.
knowledge.noBankSelected: Select a bank to inspect its pages.
knowledge.pageContentPlaceholder: Write the knowledge page content here...
knowledge.pageCreateHint: New pages are created on first save.
knowledge.searchDescription: SearchKeyword does bank-scoped lexical recall. SearchHybrid extends the same bank-scoped surface with hybrid retrieval when the runtime supports it.
knowledge.searchEmpty: Run a bank-scoped keyword search to inspect current recall results.
knowledge.searchEmptyHybrid: Run a bank-scoped hybrid search to inspect current retrieval results.
knowledge.hybridUnavailable: Hybrid search is unavailable on the current runtime capability tier.
knowledge.hybridEmbeddingUnavailable: Hybrid search requires an embedding profile that is not currently available.
knowledge.hybridIndexNotReady: Hybrid search is enabled, but the vector index is not ready yet.
knowledge.hybridRefreshInProgress: Hybrid search is temporarily unavailable while the knowledge index is refreshing.
knowledge.bankMetaDescription: Inspect the selected bank without leaving runtime-config.
knowledge.graphDescription: Wave 2B adds same-bank page links, backlinks, and bounded graph traversal without implying citation or shared truth.
knowledge.graphOutgoingHint: Create outgoing same-bank links from the currently selected page.
knowledge.noLinks: No outgoing links for the current page yet.
knowledge.noSavedPageSelected: Save or select a page to inspect graph links.
knowledge.backlinksHint: Incoming links into the selected page remain read-only projections.
knowledge.noBacklinks: No backlinks for the current page yet.
knowledge.graphTraversalHint: Breadth-first expansion stays inside the selected bank and root page boundary.
knowledge.noGraphNodes: No traversal nodes are available for the current page.

recommend.heroTitle: Best local models for this machine
recommend.heroBody: This page ranks chat, image, and video candidates with the current device profile, then keeps install and variant review on the same local runtime contracts.
recommend.searchPlaceholder: Search title, repo, tag, or entry…
recommend.staleNotice: The recommendation feed is currently showing the last successful snapshot. Refresh when the model-index worker is reachable again.
recommend.offlineEmpty: No recommendation snapshot is available yet. Connect the model-index worker, then refresh this page.
recommend.noMatches: Nothing matched the current filters. Try another search term or capability.
recommend.topMatchesEmpty: No recommended or runnable matches yet for this capability.
recommend.worthTryingEmpty: No tight-fit candidates are currently in this feed.
recommend.installedEmpty: No installed models in this capability are currently tracked by the recommendation feed.
recommend.searchMoreEmpty: No additional candidates remain after the current filters.
recommend.entryPending: Review plan to pick an entry.
recommend.whyRankingTierBody: Items are grouped by recommended, runnable, tight, then everything else. The tier always means main-model fit, not full workflow readiness.
recommend.whyRankingHostBody: Managed support, attached-only support, and unsupported hosts are shown beside the fit tier so a memory fit never hides runtime constraints.
recommend.whyRankingConfidenceBody: SafeTensors repos and heuristic llmfit candidates can still show up, but lower confidence keeps incomplete metadata from looking definitive.
recommend.installPreviewEmpty: Review an item to inspect the exact entry, files, engine, and warnings before starting an install.
recommend.variantsEmpty: Open variants on a model card to compare alternative entries before reviewing the plan.
recommend.variantsUnavailable: No variant metadata was returned for this repo.
